title: DynamicUI
body:
## ✨ Mod replaces most of the game menu animations
![1](https://i.imgur.com/cYWXRb7.png)
Say goodbye to the static vanilla interface — this mod breathes life into Minecraft's main menu with stylish and dynamic transitions.
## 🎨 Each type of button has its own unique effect
![2](https://i.imgur.com/RskFvoS.png)
![3](https://i.imgur.com/305XTkf.png)

Buttons now respond with custom animations, hover effects, and smooth motion that reflect their function and category.

## 🧪 Currently in Beta
The mod is still under active development, so some visual bugs or layout inconsistencies may occur.

## 🌐 Language support
- Russian
- English (US)

Using other languages may lead to **incorrect color highlighting** or **layout issues** with special buttons.
